subject: Action needed: beagle planning in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-7777
body: Here is a progress summary for the beagle plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Mahatma Gandhi as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-7777. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
